title: Mutant Skeleton Armor Tweaks
description: Mutant Skeleton Chestplate now compatible with crossbows!
body:
This mod allows the Mutant Skeleton Chestplate from Fuzs' Mutant Monsters mod to be compatible with crossbows. There's also a nice little tooltip that shows what each armor piece does.
Armor functionality + the crossbow tweak can be toggled on/off in the config file.

Made for the Prominence II modpack, but works perfectly in vanilla as well.
